change.title: AI-assisted invoice approval and refund workflow
change.summary: A new AI agent reviews invoices, recommends refund approvals, and syncs payment state to the ERP. The release touches authentication, billing, webhook sync, and dashboard review screens.
change.business_context: Finance wants to reduce manual refund review time without losing release control. The risky part is that an AI agent can recommend refunds and downstream systems update automatically unless a human approval gate catches high-risk cases.
change.diff_excerpt: Adds ai_agent_recommend_refund(), updates admin role checks, sends refund webhook events to ERP, and changes dashboard state from pending_review to auto_recommended.

change.title: Authentication warning copy update
change.summary: Updates authentication warning copy shown before protected actions.
change.business_context: The change is small, but it still touches a protected access message and should receive focused review.
change.diff_excerpt: Adjust warning text before a protected action. Verify the message does not weaken user review.

change.title: Help-center wording update
change.summary: Updates help-center wording only. No protected feature or backend behavior changes.
change.diff_excerpt: Text-only change for help-center article wording.
